defs: Pleasing, either to the mind or senses; pleasant; grateful; as, agreeable manners or remarks; an agreeable person; fruit agreeable to the taste.
Willing; ready to agree or consent.
quotes: These Frenchmen give unto the said captain of Calais a great sum of money, so that he will be but content and agreeable that they may enter into the said town.

defs: Agreeing or suitable; conformable; correspondent; concordant; adapted; -- followed by to, rarely by with.
quotes: That which is agreeable to the nature of one thing, is many times contrary to the nature of another.

defs: In pursuance, conformity, or accordance; -- in this sense used adverbially for agreeably; as, agreeable to the order of the day, the House took up the report.
